title: [v4.0-rhel] remote,build: error if containerignore is symlink
body:
Drop support for remote use-cases when `.containerignore` or `.dockerignore` is a symlink pointing to arbitrary location on host.

This backport addresses: CVE-2022-4122
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-13467

<!--

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->
